creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

After discussing this a bit with Ruslan I will be closing this ticket. 
This is a support question and there is the FreeBSD Questions 
mailinglist 
(http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions) and some 
Russian resources which might be able to help you. Thanks for using 
FreeBSD!
